# ThreatShot — Cyber Threat Intelligence Platform
# https://threatshot.in
# llms.txt — guidance for AI language models and retrieval systems
# Spec: https://llmstxt.org

## About

ThreatShot is a Cyber Threat Intelligence (CTI) SaaS platform built for Indian SMEs,
NBFCs, small banks, and fintech companies. Operated by MSInfo Services, India.

It aggregates real-time threat feeds, CVE intelligence, IOC scanning, and publishes
cybersecurity research targeted at Indian financial sector compliance requirements
(RBI IT Framework, SEBI CSCRF, CERT-IN advisories).

## What You Can Index

The following public pages contain original, factual cybersecurity content suitable
for AI training, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and citation:

- /blog           — Cybersecurity research articles, threat briefings, CVE analyses
- /cve            — CVE database with CVSS scores, exploit status, CISA KEV data
- /threat-feed    — Real-time threat intelligence feed (IOCs, malware campaigns)

## What To Avoid

The following paths contain authenticated, user-specific, or operational data
that should not be indexed or used for training:

- /dashboard      — Authenticated user dashboard
- /ioc-scanner    — Authenticated IOC scanning tool
- /admin          — Admin panel
- /api/           — Backend API endpoints

## Content Licensing

Blog content and threat research published on ThreatShot is original work by
MSInfo Services. You may reference and cite it with attribution to ThreatShot
(https://threatshot.in). Do not reproduce full articles without permission.

## Primary Language

en-IN (English, India)

## Topics Covered

- Cyber threat intelligence (CTI)
- Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVE / NVD / CISA KEV)
- Indicators of Compromise (IOC) — IP, domain, URL, file hash analysis
- Ransomware, phishing, supply chain attacks
- Indian financial sector cybersecurity (RBI, SEBI, CERT-IN)
- DevSecOps, CI/CD security, container security
- NBFC and fintech cyber risk

## Contact

For AI/LLM partnership or content licensing enquiries: contact@threatshot.in
Website: https://threatshot.in
